'''Tuskers''' were creatures native to [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. They had snouts, and could grow up to a hundred [[Kilogram/Legends|kilos]] in mass.<ref name="Shatter">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
